items.prompt: Summarize the primary journey Marlow undertakes in 'Heart of Darkness'.
keyPoints: Marlow's voyage up the Congo River
The symbolic journey into the 'heart of darkness'

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Identify the main narrative structure used in 'Heart of Darkness'.
keyPoints: Use of an unnamed first-person narrator

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Describe the character of Kurtz in 'Heart of Darkness'.
keyPoints: Kurtz as a charismatic yet morally ambiguous figure
His role as a representative of European imperialism

markingCriteria.full: Includes all key points with accurate detail
markingCriteria.partial: Includes 1-2 key points or lacks detail

items.prompt: Apply the theme of colonialism in 'Heart of Darkness' to a modern context.

markingCriteria.full: Applies theme effectively with relevant examples
markingCriteria.partial: Applies theme with limited examples or lacks depth

items.prompt: How would Marlow's journey be different if set in the 21st century?

markingCriteria.full: Considers all aspects effectively with relevant examples

items.prompt: Apply the motif of darkness in 'Heart of Darkness' to describe a modern psychological conflict.
keyPoints: The concept of the unknown or repressed instincts

items.prompt: Evaluate the effectiveness of Conrad's use of symbolism in 'Heart of Darkness'.
keyPoints: Symbolic representation of the Congo River
Effect on reader's understanding of themes

markingCriteria.partial: Evaluates with some use of PEEL, covering some key points
markingCriteria.none: Fails to evaluate effectively or lacks structure
